functions.functionContentWithoutFormatting: { ASSERT(CPUTimer_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write to FREE_SOFT bits of register TCR // HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TCR) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TCR) & ~(CPUTIMER_TCR_FREE | CPUTIMER_TCR_SOFT)) | (uint16_t)mode); }
{ ASSERT(CPUTimer_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set TIF bit of TCR register // HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TCR) |= CPUTIMER_TCR_TIF; }
{ ASSERT(CPUTimer_isBaseValid(base)); // // Clear TIE bit of TCR register // HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TCR) &= (uint16_t)(~CPUTIMER_TCR_TIE); }

{ uint16_t tcrValue = 0; ASSERT(CPUTimer_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set TIE bit of TCR register // tcrValue = (uint16_t)(HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TCR) & (~CPUTIMER_TCR_TIF)); HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TCR) = tcrValue | CPUTIMER_TCR_TIE; }

{ uint16_t tcrValue = 0; ASSERT(CPUTimer_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set TRB bit of register TCR // tcrValue = (uint16_t)(HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TCR) & (~CPUTIMER_TCR_TIF)); HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TCR) = tcrValue | CPUTIMER_TCR_TRB; }

{ uint16_t tcrValue = 0; ASSERT(CPUTimer_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set TSS bit of register TCR // tcrValue = (uint16_t)(HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TCR) & (~CPUTIMER_TCR_TIF)); HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TCR) = tcrValue | CPUTIMER_TCR_TSS; }
{ ASSERT(CPUTimer_isBaseValid(base)); // // Clear TSS bit of register TCR // HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TCR) &= (uint16_t)(~CPUTIMER_TCR_TSS); }

{ uint16_t tcrValue = 0; ASSERT(CPUTimer_isBaseValid(base)); // // Reload the timer counter // tcrValue = (uint16_t)(HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TCR) & (~CPUTIMER_TCR_TIF)); HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TCR) = tcrValue | CPUTIMER_TCR_TRB; // // Clear TSS bit of register TCR // HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TCR) &= (uint16_t)~CPUTIMER_TCR_TSS; }
{ ASSERT(CPUTimer_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(periodCount > 1U); // // Load the MSB period Count // HWREG(base + CPUTIMER_O_PRD) = (periodCount - 1U); }
{ ASSERT(CPUTimer_isBaseValid(base)); // // Get the TIMH:TIM registers value // return(HWREG(base + CPUTIMER_O_TIM)); }

{ ASSERT(CPUTimer_isBaseValid(base)); // // Writes to TPR.TDDR and TPRH.TDDRH bits // HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TPRH) = prescaler >> 8U; HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TPR) = (prescaler & CPUTIMER_TPR_TDDR_M) ; }
{ ASSERT(CPUTimer_isBaseValid(base)); // // Check if TIF bits of register TCR are set // return(((HWREGH(base + CPUTIMER_O_TCR) & CPUTIMER_TCR_TIF) == CPUTIMER_TCR_TIF) ? true : false); }
